MAJOR_09.name: The Hermit

upright.action: Isolates the current slot reel row from external telemetry corruption; freezes adjacent buffs for 2 spin iterations.

inverted.action: Flipping gravity triggers localized system freeze. Completely blocks player resource accumulation on this column until manually nudged.

MAJOR_09.visual_spec: Bas-relief weathered iron token featuring a gaunt, bearded gnome shaman holding a vacuum-tube lantern that casts crisp cyan vector tracking lines across metallic contours.

MAJOR_10.name: Wheel of Fortune

upright.action: Alters the payload multiplier dynamically based on real-time spin velocity gear ratios (+2x to +10x range).

inverted.action: Forces an unpredictable, volatile reallocation of active user mana pool scores, scrambling active character sheets randomly.

MAJOR_10.visual_spec: Tactile stamped brass medallion mapping out complex interlocking gear assemblies flanked by sculpted storm giant crests, overlaid with an active orange targeting crosshair HUD.

MAJOR_13.name: Death

upright.action: Executes a clean full-screen board wipe, instantly liquidating expired variables to flush cash tokens into memory slots.

inverted.action: Prevents stale tiles from clearing out of the grid window, forcing the user's party to process clogged, un-optimizable logic data lines.

MAJOR_13.visual_spec: Heavy chiseled steel bas-relief containing a massive skeletal knight in brutalist iron plate armor. A brilliant horizontal cyan payline trace tracks his blade's edge.

MAJOR_15.name: The Devil

upright.action: Binds adjacent minor tiles to its layout point, pooling their aggregate values into a high-tier critical payout target.

inverted.action: Imposes a strict stun status trap on nearby heroes, siphoning a steady drainage of focus points per operational tick.

MAJOR_15.visual_spec: Starnished oxidized copper medallion featuring an imposing horn-crested dark elf rogue crouched on a locked vault ledger, with amber HUD indicators tracing mechanical boundary limits.

WANDS.upright_focus: Velocity amplification, explosive combination triggers, payline expansion.
WANDS.inverted_focus: Uncontrolled burnout, rapid resource depletion parameters, over-heating friction.

CUPS.upright_focus: Mana restoration, memory cleansing shields, damage negation fields.
CUPS.inverted_focus: Stagnant drainage, emotional distortion blockers, tracking fog hazards.

SWORDS.upright_focus: Grid node manipulation, clearing path obstructions, micro-nudge agilities.
SWORDS.inverted_focus: Directionless crosswinds, broken code line fractures, mental data bleeding.

PENTACLES.upright_focus: Persistent value stacking, locking asset arrays in place, multi-spin defense vaults.
PENTACLES.inverted_focus: Severe systemic material friction, frozen inventory states, structural weight drag.
